rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal; Beirut strikes and G7 are distant background noise with no meaningful link to Portuguese daily life. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut
top_events.summary: Ongoing Beirut strikes carry minor indirect energy price risk for Portugal but represent no new escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: Large UK-Japan bilateral deal; negligible direct impact on Portugal's economy or trade.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain injures 17; minor regional safety note but no systemic impact on Portugal.
